description_long: This machine gun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly black metal body and a perforated cylindrical barrel for heat dissipation. The stock is constructed from wood, with a squared-off, utilitarian shape and visible mounting hardware. A large, drum-shaped magazine is attached beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity ammunition feed. The top of the receiver includes a prominent sighting mechanism, likely for aiming, and the overall construction is solid and heavy-duty. The gun also has a forward grip and a mounting point beneath the barrel, possibly for a bipod or other support. The combination of metal and wood materials gives it a classic, rugged appearance suitable for urban defense or military scenarios.
description: A heavy-duty machine gun with a black metal body, perforated barrel, wooden stock, and a large drum magazine. It features robust construction and prominent sighting and mounting components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, drum magazine to the right, and the squared wooden stock at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the perforated barrel, the large drum magazine beneath, and the wooden stock with mounting hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock, with the barrel and drum magazine extending forward and the sighting mechanism visible on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the drum magazine, barrel perforations, and the robust metal receiver with the wooden stock at the back.
attribute_barrel_type: perforated cylindrical barrel with heat dissipation holes
attribute_stock_design: fixed wooden stock with squared-off shape and visible mounting hardware
attribute_mounting_mechanism: mounting point beneath barrel, likely for bipod or support
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: fixed rear sight with front post
